title: Principal Radiologist at GE Healthcare India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at GE Healthcare India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
